steps.title: Find the area of circle M
steps.content:
Circle $M$ has radius $3$, so use the circle area formula.
$$A_M=\pi(3)^2=9\pi$$

steps.title: Add the two circle areas
steps.content:
Circle $N$ has area $144\pi$. Add the two areas to get the total area.
$$9\pi+144\pi=153\pi$$
The answer is D.
